programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: A journalist relentlessly investigates to uncover the truth behind the sudden and mysterious disappearance of a young activist.

programme.title: Cirkus
programme.desc: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

programme.title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
programme.desc: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: A famous magician plans to marry his girlfriend. However, he is secretly scarred by persistent hallucinations of his dead sister and is forced to seek psychiatric help.

programme.title: Janhit Mein Jaari
programme.desc: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of Raju, Shyam and Baburao change completely when they get cheated by a fraudster. Desperate to repay a loan from a feared gangster, they scramble to find an alternative solution.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: In 1953, Pakhi, an aristocrat's daughter, falls in love with an archaeologist. However, unbeknownst to her, he leads a double life that threatens their relationship.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

programme.title: The Dirty Picture
programme.desc: Reshma, a village girl, achieves immense success in the male-dominated film industry. However, as her career rises, she pays a heavy price for it.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveal his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: After a Muslim porter falls in love with the rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest, their love is tested due to misunderstandings and a natural disaster.
